ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cherry, flesh and skin, pitted, raw
Pineapple, in pineapple juice, canned, drained
Pistachio nut, grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Roasted Blanched Almonds (40%) • nut Apple Juice Infused Cherries (17%) (Cherries • Apple Juice From Concentrate • Sunflower Oil) - Pheapple Juice Infused Cranberries (17%) (Cranberries • Pineapple Juice From Concentrate • Sunflower Oil) • Apple Juice Infused Blueberries (16%) (Blueberries • Apple Juice From Concentrate • Sunflower Oil)  Pistachio Nuts (10%)
